_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of supply chain risk management standards, processes, and practices.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model supply chain security, including risks in open-source model adoption, fine-tuning pipeline integrity, third-party dataset provenance, and model registry security controls.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-K-011 (RM, cosine: 0.643), RM-K-009 (RM, cosine: 0.578).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.596). Shared vocabulary: [chain, knowledge, supply]. DCWF-only terms [management, practices, processes, risk, standards] vs WIDAI-only terms [adoption, controls, dataset, fine, integrity, model] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.891 (P=0.922, R=0.861). P exceeds R by 0.061 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (91.1%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of supply chain risk management standards, processes, and practices." and "Knowledge of model supply chain security, including risks in open-source model a". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.643 ≈ STS 0.596 (gap 0.047). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [chain, knowledge, supply] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 17.9%. Shared tokens: [chain, knowledge, supply]. DCWF-only: [management, practices, processes, risk, standards]. WIDAI-only: [adoption, controls, dataset, fine, integrity, model].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 91.1% on Superset of classification. The matched KSA operates in a different professional domain than the obligation/competency requires. STS 0.596 passed the threshold but secondary signals contradict the match.
